data.title: Sparx Hockey becomes official skate sharpener of U.S. Pond Hockey Championships, expanding partnership. Based in Acton, Mass.
data.description: A well-known skate sharpening brand, Sparx Hockey, has extended its longstanding partnership with the Pond Hockey Classic. This partnership expansion was revealed on January 16, 2026, in Acton, Massachusetts. Sparx Hockey is renowned for its automated skate sharpening equipment and continues to be a leader in the industry. The specific details regarding the expansion, including the duration and scope, were not disclosed in the release. This move highlights the commitment of both Sparx Hockey and the Pond Hockey Classic to furthering their collaboration and enhancing the quality of services provided to their customers.

data.title: Endeavour Silver corrects typographical error in 2026 guidance; AISC for Terronera remains unchanged.
data.description: A recent news release from Endeavour Silver Corp. dated January 16, 2026, has been re-filed on SEDAR due to a typographical error on page 3 regarding the AISC for Terronera. The consolidated AISC figure remains unchanged from the original report. This updated release serves to replace the initial version.

data.title: University of Phoenix and LinkedIn to host free webinar on AI in nursing on Jan 22, 2026. Practical guidance for nurses.
data.description: On January 22, a virtual event titled "AI in Action: Skills and Strategies for a New Era of Nursing" is scheduled to take place. During this event, valuable career-related advice will be shared with nurses on how to incorporate artificial intelligence into their work. The event will be hosted by University of Phoenix and LinkedIn. This webinar, set for January 22, 2026, will focus on practical strategies that nurses can immediately utilize. It is free to attend and will provide nurses with insights on how to leverage AI in their field.

data.title: Pet Flavors, LLC appoints Randolph Legg to Board alongside Fabian Kausche in a new chapter for the company.
data.description: A company based in Melbourne, Florida, Pet Flavors, LLC, announced on January 16, 2026, its plans to embark on a new phase. The company is known for producing high-quality flavor bases and palatants for chewable pharmaceuticals for pets. With a fresh vision and a revamped management team in place, Pet Flavors, LLC aims to steer the company towards a promising future.

data.title: Thyme&Table™ debuts Valentine's Day collection of drinkware and kitchen appliances for Walmart; includes charm glasses and tumblers.
data.description: Thyme&Table™, a prominent family-owned brand known for its stylish and high-performance homewares, has launched a new collection featuring a charming array of glasses, tumblers, and kitchen appliances. This lineup showcases a romantic and elegant color scheme with soft pinks, warm reds, and delicate heart-shaped accents. The release took place in New York on January 16, 2026.

data.title: Golden Gate Global raises over $1 billion in EB-5 capital, with $300 million in repayments to 600+ investors.
data.description: In SAN FRANCISCO, GGG has recently achieved a significant milestone by exceeding $1 billion in total capital raised through the EB-5 visa program. Additionally, they have surpassed $300 million in repayments to over 600 investors participating in the program.
Robinhood now offers prediction market 'Custom Combos,' appealing to customers interested in gambling in the stock market.

data.title: Flowtica, AI recording pen showcased at CES 2026, gains attention from media, investors, and industry.
data.description: In January 16, 2026, during CES 2026 in Las Vegas, Flowtica, an AI company from Singapore, may not have had the most attention-grabbing presence at the event. Despite this, the company managed to garner significant interest throughout the week from various stakeholders, including media, investors, and industry professionals.

data.title: Northeastern Illinois University upgraded by Moody's to investment-grade status from Ba1 to Baa3, with a stable outlook.
data.description: In a recent announcement made on January 16, 2026, Northeastern Illinois University (NEIU) revealed that Moody's Ratings has increased the University's issuer rating from Ba1 to Baa3. This upgrade puts NEIU in the investment-grade category, signifying a notable improvement in its financial standing. Along with the rating change, the university's outlook has been adjusted to stable, indicating a positive trajectory for its future financial performance. This development underscores NEIU's rising credibility and financial stability in the higher education sector.

data.title: ACRC Surrogacy donated toys and gift sets to support mothers and children during the holiday season in Long Beach.
data.description: ACRC Surrogacy recently took part in a Long Beach holiday toy drive by contributing toys and gift sets to aid mothers and children in need during the festive period. In an industry typically focused on medical achievements and successful outcomes, this gesture highlights the importance of supporting families and spreading joy. The organization's participation helped brighten the holidays for many as they donated a significant number of toys and gift sets to the cause.
IAEA: Secured the agreement of both Russia and Ukraine to implement a localized ceasefire.

data.title: WestJet reverses reconfigured seat plan after concerns from employees and guests. CUPE 8125 representing 4,700 Cabin Crew Members.
data.description: In Calgary, CUPE 8125, which represents more than 4,700 Cabin Crew Members at WestJet and Encore, has recognized WestJet's change in plans to revert the widely criticized new 28-inch-pitch seat setup. This decision comes after substantial feedback from employees and customers about the negative operational effects and overall passenger experience caused by the more crowded cabin configuration. The union stated that their members have expressed concerns over heightened tensions onboard due to the altered aircraft, leading to this reversal by WestJet.

data.title: Tiziana Life Sciences closes $8.8 million direct offering of 7,040,000 ordinary shares at $1.25 each, with potential $10.56 million additional gross proceeds from warrants.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, Tiziana Life Sciences, Ltd. announced the completion of a registered direct offering of 7,040,000 ordinary shares at a rate of $1.25 per share. The total gross proceeds amounted to $8.8 million, after accounting for estimated offering expenses. The offering was conducted without an underwriter or placement agent, exclusively for senior management and existing shareholders. Furthermore, participants in the offering will receive one warrant for each ordinary share purchased, allowing them to subscribe for an additional ordinary share at a price of $1.50 until July 16, 2026. This may potentially generate extra gross proceeds of around $10.56 million.
Venezuelan government tells 4 banks they will split $300 mln of oil revenues for use in currency exchange, according to sources.

data.title: Gary Gordon Scholarship 2026 opens for finance-minded entrepreneurs nationwide. Applications now accepted for undergraduate students.
data.description: Jericho, New York - On January 16, 2026, the Gary Gordon Scholarship for Entrepreneurs has opened its application period for undergraduate students across the country. This scholarship is intended for students who exhibit a strong dedication to entrepreneurship, innovation, and business leadership. Founded by Gary Gordon, the scholarship aims to support the next generation of entrepreneurial minds.

data.title: Investigation underway: Brighthouse Financial sale to Aquarian Capital LLC being evaluated by KSF. Charles C. Foti leads probe.
data.description: Legal professional Charles C. Foti, Jr. and the law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC are conducting an investigation into the planned acquisition of Brighthouse Financial, Inc. (NasdaqGS: BHF) by Aquarian Capital LLC. The former Attorney General of Louisiana is looking into this takeover to ensure transparency and legality. This move, which involves significant financial transactions and a change in ownership, is under scrutiny for any potential implications it may have.
